brands.name: Coca-Cola
brands.colorUsage: Coca-Cola Red is sacred — consistent globally. White Spencerian script on red. Black for Coke Zero. Silver for Diet Coke. Red should dominate, not accent. Contour bottle shape is equally important.
brands.typographyScale: Display: 64px/1.0 • H1: 48px/1.1 • H2: 36px/1.15 • H3: 24px/1.2 • Body: 16px/1.5 • Small: 14px/1.4. Bold, confident headlines.
brands.spacing: Base: 8px. Section margins: 80-100px. Card padding: 24px. Full-bleed imagery common. Generous whitespace around products.
brands.components:
• Hero: Full-bleed red or product imagery
• Product cards: Bottle/can image + name + description
• CTAs: Red buttons on white, white on red
• Navigation: Simple, red accents
• Buttons: Rounded (full pill), red fill, white text
• Carousel: Product showcase, swipe
brands.elevation:
• Minimal shadows — flat, bold design
• Product shots: Subtle drop shadow for depth
• Cards: 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.1)
• Red areas: Often flat, no shadow
brands.motion: Celebratory, refreshing. Bubble animations for fizz. Pour effects. Duration: 300-500ms. Smooth scrolling. Video-heavy (happiness, moments).
brands.layout: Marketing-heavy. Hero → Products → Story → Footer. Full-width sections. Centered content. Mobile-first responsive. Campaign landing pages.
brands.responsive:
• Desktop (>1200px): Full-width heroes, large typography
• Tablet (768-1200px): Stacked sections
• Mobile (<768px): Single column, swipeable products, sticky header
brands.iconStyle: Minimal icons — brand relies on product shapes. Contour bottle silhouette. Cap icon. Simple social icons. Red accents.
brands.interactiveStates:
• Hover: Slight lift for products, darken for buttons
• Focus: Red outline ring
• Active: Scale 0.98
• Loading: Red spinner
brands.mediaPatterns:
• Product photography: High-gloss, condensation drops, ice
• Lifestyle: Happy moments, sharing, togetherness
• Heritage: Vintage ads, glass bottles
• Contour bottle: Hero product, any angle
• Video: Celebration, music, joy
brands.copyVoice: Joyful, universal. 'Open Happiness.' (legacy) 'Real Magic.' (current). Emotional, not feature-focused. Celebration. Togetherness. Short, memorable taglines.

brands.name: McDonald's
brands.colorUsage: Golden Arches yellow is primary — instantly recognizable. Red for appetite and energy. Modern McDonald's uses more black backgrounds for premium feel. Green/brown for McCafé. Yellow should pop.
brands.typographyScale: Display: 56px/1.05 • H1: 40px/1.1 • H2: 32px/1.15 • H3: 24px/1.2 • Body: 16px/1.5 • Small: 14px/1.4. Bold, friendly headlines.
brands.spacing: Base: 8px. Section margins: 64-80px. Card padding: 20px. Menu items: Compact. App: Dense but readable.
brands.components:
• Menu cards: Food image + name + price + customize CTA
• Golden Arches: Logo mark, various sizes
• Order button: Yellow or red, prominent
• Location finder: Map + list hybrid
• Buttons: Rounded (8px), yellow primary, 48px height
• Offers: Badge style, red accent
brands.elevation:
• Level 0: Flat (menus, lists)
• Level 1: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.1) — Cards
• Level 2: 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.15) — Modals
• Food photos: Styled shadows for depth
brands.motion: Friendly, appetizing. Food reveals: Smooth fade. Order: Progress animation. Duration: 200-300ms. App: Snappy transitions. Loading: Arches animation.
brands.layout: App: Bottom nav, category tabs, scrolling menu. Web: Header + hero + menu sections. Ordering: Linear flow. Location-aware content.
brands.responsive:
• Desktop (>1024px): Full menu grid, location sidebar
• Tablet (768-1024px): Simplified grid
• Mobile (primary): Bottom nav, card lists, thumb-friendly
brands.iconStyle: Friendly rounded icons, 24px. Food category icons. Location pin. Order bag. Golden Arches as logo mark always.
brands.interactiveStates:
• Hover: Slight scale for menu items
• Focus: Yellow outline ring
• Active: Darken
• Added to cart: Checkmark animation
• Customizing: Yellow accents
brands.mediaPatterns:
• Food photography: Styled, appetizing, on dark or red backgrounds
• Golden Arches: Hero placement, various contexts
• Packaging: Product in packaging, lifestyle
• People: Families, friends, employees
• Video: Food prep, happy moments
brands.copyVoice: Friendly, approachable. 'i'm lovin' it.' Informal, warm. Menu items are proper nouns (Big Mac). Community-focused. 'Have a Good Time.'

brands.name: Nike
brands.colorUsage: Black and white foundation. Product colors come from the shoes/apparel. Orange/Volt for energy. Dark heroes with white text. Swoosh can be any color but black is core. Minimalist, bold.

typography.headings: Nike Futura Bold / Helvetica Neue Bold

brands.typographyScale: Hero: 120px/0.9/−0.02em • Display: 72px/0.95 • H1: 48px/1.0 • H2: 36px/1.05 • H3: 24px/1.1 • Body: 16px/1.5 • Small: 14px/1.4. MASSIVE headlines, tight tracking.
brands.spacing: Base: 8px. Section margins: 80-120px. Product grid: 24px gap. Full-bleed common. Generous negative space. Max-width: 1920px for heroes.
brands.components:
• Product cards: Image dominant, name + price below
• Hero: Full-bleed athlete or product, massive text
• Shop button: Simple, black or white
• Size selector: Grid of sizes
• Buttons: Simple rectangles, black fill, 48px height
• Carousel: Product showcase, peek edges
brands.elevation:
• Minimal elevation — bold flat design
• Product hover: Subtle lift
• Cards: 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.08)
• Focus on typography and imagery, not shadows
brands.motion: Athletic, dynamic. Product reveals: Quick, powerful. Video: Athletes in motion. Duration: 200-400ms. Scroll: Parallax effects. Swoosh animations.
brands.layout: Editorial feel. Full-width sections. Product pages: Large image gallery, details right. Grid: Asymmetric often. Hero → Story → Products. Mobile: Single column, swipeable.
brands.responsive:
• Desktop (>1440px): Full editorial, massive typography
• Laptop (1024-1440px): Scaled typography
• Tablet (768-1024px): Stacked, reduced type sizes
• Mobile (<768px): Single column, swipeable carousels, bottom nav
brands.iconStyle: Minimal icons, 24px. Simple lines. Swoosh is THE icon. Heart for favorites. Cart. Filter. Black or white depending on background.
brands.interactiveStates:
• Hover: Image zoom, show secondary image
• Focus: Black outline ring
• Active: Quick snap
• Favorited: Heart fill
• Size selected: Black background
brands.mediaPatterns:
• Athletes: Action shots, dramatic lighting, emotion
• Products: Clean, white or dark backgrounds, multiple angles
• Lifestyle: Street, sport, culture
• Video: High production, athlete stories
• Swoosh: Any size, any color, recognizable anywhere
brands.copyVoice: Motivational, athletic. 'Just Do It.' Imperative, active voice. Short, punchy. Athlete quotes. Performance language. Inspiring, never soft.

brands.name: Adidas
brands.colorUsage: Black and white foundation. Three Stripes on products are the brand. Blue for Originals heritage. Product colors come from the items. Performance: Bold accent colors. Lifestyle: More muted.
brands.typographyScale: Hero: 80px/0.95 • Display: 56px/1.0 • H1: 40px/1.05 • H2: 32px/1.1 • H3: 24px/1.15 • Body: 16px/1.5 • Small: 14px/1.4. Bold, condensed for headlines.
brands.spacing: Base: 8px. Section margins: 64-96px. Product grid: 16-24px gap. Dense product layouts. Mobile: Full-width cards.
brands.components:
• Product cards: Image + name + price, hover shows colors
• Size guide: Interactive measurement tool
• Filter bar: Horizontal, collapsible
• Buttons: Simple, black or white, 48px height, no border-radius
• Three Stripes: Integrated into UI elements
• Member badge: Creators Club tiers
brands.elevation:
• Flat design emphasis
• Product hover: Scale 1.02
• Cards: Minimal shadow, border
• Focus on stripes and product, not depth
brands.motion: Athletic, street. Product reveals: Quick fade. Video: Sport and culture. Duration: 200-300ms. Scroll animations: Subtle. Three Stripes: Motion element.
brands.layout: E-commerce focused. Grid layouts for products. Editorial sections break the grid. Filtering prominent. Hero → Featured → Categories. Dense but organized.
brands.responsive:
• Desktop (>1440px): 4-6 column product grids
• Laptop (1024-1440px): 3-4 columns
• Tablet (768-1024px): 2-3 columns
• Mobile (<768px): 2 columns or list view, bottom sheet filters
brands.iconStyle: Simple icons, 24px. No decoration. Three Stripes is the icon. Heart, cart, search. Black or white only.
brands.interactiveStates:
• Hover: Product image change (angle or colorway)
• Focus: Black outline
• Active: Press effect
• Favorited: Filled heart
• Size unavailable: Strikethrough
brands.mediaPatterns:
• Athletes: Performance shots, in-action
• Products: Clean studio, multiple angles, on-foot
• Lifestyle: Street culture, collaborations
• Video: Sport, music, culture mashup
• Three Stripes: Always visible on products
brands.copyVoice: Confident, cultural. 'Impossible Is Nothing.' Sport and culture intersection. Creator-focused. Collaboration language. Bold statements.

brands.name: Starbucks
brands.colorUsage: Starbucks Green is the brand — siren logo, cups, stores. House Green (#1E3932) for dark sections. Warm, coffee-inspired palette. Gold for Rewards loyalty. Cream for warmth.
brands.typographyScale: Display: 48px/1.1 • H1: 36px/1.15 • H2: 28px/1.2 • H3: 22px/1.25 • Body: 16px/1.5 • Small: 14px/1.4. Warm, readable scale.
brands.spacing: Base: 8px. Section margins: 64-80px. Card padding: 24px. Menu items: Comfortable spacing. App: Touch-friendly, 48px minimum tap targets.
brands.components:
• Menu cards: Drink image + name + customization options
• Order button: Green, prominent
• Rewards tracker: Progress bar to next reward
• Store locator: Map + list
• Buttons: Rounded (full pill), green primary, 48px height
• Siren logo: Various sizes, green or white
brands.elevation:
• Level 0: Flat (menus)
• Level 1: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.08) — Cards
• Level 2: 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.12) — Modals
• Warm, inviting feel over stark shadows
brands.motion: Warm, welcoming. Drink customization: Smooth transitions. Rewards: Celebration animations. Duration: 200-300ms. App: Fluid, coffee-inspired.
brands.layout: App: Home (rewards + favorites), Order (menu), Pay (card + history), Gift. Web: Story-driven, location focus. Menu: Category navigation.
brands.responsive:
• Desktop (>1024px): Full menu, store finder prominent
• Tablet (768-1024px): Simplified ordering
• Mobile (primary): Bottom nav, quick order, pay, rewards
brands.iconStyle: Rounded, friendly icons, 24px. Coffee-themed (cup, beans, steam). Green accents. Siren logo is the icon. Rewards star.
brands.interactiveStates:
• Hover: Green underline or background
• Focus: Green outline ring
• Active: Darker green
• Favorited: Filled heart
• Reward earned: Star burst animation
brands.mediaPatterns:
• Drinks: Styled photography, ingredients visible, branded cup
• Stores: Third place atmosphere, warm lighting
• People: Baristas, customers, community
• Siren: Hero placement, seasonal variations
• Video: Craft, sourcing, community stories
brands.copyVoice: Warm, personal. 'To inspire and nurture the human spirit.' Community-focused. Coffee craft language. 'Your drink, your way.' Welcoming, not corporate.

brands.name: PetScreening

primary.name: Pack Blue
primary.usage: Logo, icons, rule lines — NOT large backgrounds

primary.name: Retriever Rust
primary.usage: Warm accent, CTAs on light backgrounds

brands.colorUsage: Dog Bone White (#F9F4E6) is THE signature background — never pure white. Pack Blue for accents and icons ONLY, not backgrounds. Retriever Rust for primary CTAs. Earth tones throughout. Max 3 colors per composition. Warm, approachable, lifestyle brand feel.
brands.typographyScale: H1: 40px/1.2 • H2: 32px/1.25 • H3: 24px/1.3 • H4: 18px/1.35 • Body: 16px/1.6 • Small: 14px/1.5 • Caption: 12px/1.4. Warm, readable scale with generous line-heights.
brands.spacing: Base: 8px. Section padding: 64-80px vertical. Card padding: 24px. Form fields: 16px gap. Max-width: 1200px content. Generous whitespace for lifestyle feel.
brands.components:
• Pet profile cards: Photo + name + breed + status badge
• Status badges: Colored pills (approved green, pending yellow, etc)
• Application forms: Step-by-step wizard, progress indicator
• Document upload: Drag-drop zone, file preview
• Buttons: Rounded (8px), Rust primary, 44-48px height
• Property cards: Photo + address + pet policy
brands.elevation:
• Level 0: No shadow (flat warm surfaces)
• Level 1: 0 2px 8px rgba(31,34,87,0.08) — Cards
• Level 2: 0 4px 16px rgba(31,34,87,0.12) — Dropdowns, modals
• Level 3: 0 8px 24px rgba(31,34,87,0.15) — Dialogs
• Warm, subtle shadows using Pack Blue as base
brands.motion: Friendly, reassuring. Duration: 200-300ms. Ease: ease-out. Form steps: Slide transitions. Success: Gentle checkmark animation. Pet photo: Soft fade-in. Avoid harsh or clinical animations.
brands.layout: Application flow: Step wizard, progress at top. Dashboard: Cards grid, sidebar navigation. Property manager view: List + detail split. Mobile: Single column, sticky CTAs.
brands.responsive:
• Desktop (>1200px): Full layouts, sidebar visible
• Laptop (900-1200px): Collapsed sidebar
• Tablet (600-900px): Stacked sections, hamburger menu
• Mobile (<600px): Single column, bottom sheet modals, sticky buttons
brands.iconStyle: Rounded line icons, 20-24px. 2px stroke. Friendly, approachable style. Pet-themed icons (paw, bone, pet silhouettes). Pack Blue or Rust colored. Consistent optical weight.
brands.interactiveStates:
• Hover: Subtle warm background (#F5EED8), slight lift for cards
• Focus: Rust outline ring (2px, offset 2px)
• Active: Darken 10%
• Disabled: 50% opacity, no interaction
• Success: Green accent + checkmark
• Error: Fire Hydrant Red highlight + icon
brands.mediaPatterns:
• Pet photos: Circle or rounded-lg (12px), various sizes (48/80/120/200px)
• Property photos: 16:9 aspect, rounded-lg
• Document previews: Thumbnail + file type icon
• Empty states: Friendly pet illustrations, encouraging copy
• Avatars: Circle, with pet silhouette fallback
• Hero images: Lifestyle photography with pets, warm tones
brands.copyVoice: Warm, trustworthy, pet-loving. 'Screen your pet, not your patience.' Second-person, friendly. Avoids jargon. Reassuring for pet owners, professional for property managers. 'Welcome to the Pack.' Animal puns acceptable but not overdone.
designPrinciples: Contemporary, clean, warm — lifestyle brand feel
Use navy sparingly (small accents, not backgrounds)
Organic shapes and flowing lines over rigid geometry
